# LEZAC explosion playback oracle malformed fixture.
# A BP-4 local scratch value is only meaningful when the observed freeze is the
# high-debris word gate at 1000:4C75. This fixture marks a later call-site stop
# instead, so the oracle must reject it.
capture=explosion_playback
source=dosbox-regular-process-memory
temp_copy=1
visual_claim=0
instrumented_freeze_observed=1
runtime_freeze_patch_applied=1
instrumented_bp4_local_present=1
instrumented_bp4_local_cs_offset=0x4c7e
instrumented_bp4_local_value=0x0003

runtime_cs=1A2B
runtime_ds=2B3C

break ghidra=1000:414A runtime=1A2B:414A label=explosion_dispatcher
break ghidra=1000:370E runtime=1A2B:370E label=tile_damage_queue
break ghidra=1000:4C96 runtime=1A2B:4C96 label=effect_forward_pass_call observed=runtime_child_memory_freeze_observed
